items.title: xAI's Grok 3 reportedly closes in on frontier-model benchmarks
items.summary: Early leaks suggest xAI's next model is scoring close to GPT-5 and Claude 4 on reasoning benchmarks, though still behind on long-context and multilingual tasks. Musk teased a late-Q3 release on X.

items.title: SpaceX Starship IFT-18 returns booster to launch site after record 14th flight
items.summary: The booster landed on the floating platform in the Gulf of Mexico on its 14th flight, bringing total Starship flights to 18. Orbital refueling demo is targeted for IFT-19.

items.title: Tesla FSD v13.5 rolls out to wider fleet, urban left-turn score hits 99.2%
items.summary: A larger North American cohort is receiving v13.5 over-the-air. Internal data shows significant improvement in unprotected left turns and pedestrian-aware yielding.

items.title: Major agent frameworks converge on MCP — Anthropic, OpenAI commit to common protocol
items.summary: A shared Model Context Protocol draft is published with reference implementations; agents from Claude, GPT, and open-source models can now share tools across runtimes.

items.title: Nvidia Blackwell Ultra sampling starts in July; inference clusters getting double bandwidth
items.summary: Nvidia has begun seeding Blackwell Ultra GPUs to cloud partners. H200 successor promises up to 1.8x inference throughput per watt on 400B+ parameter models.

items.title: Neuralink patient #5 demonstrates wireless EEG readout at live demo
items.summary: The fifth human trial subject used a next-gen thinner electrode array to type at 92 wpm. A consumer-grade version is hinted for 2027 pending FDA clearance.

items.title: EU AI Act enforcement starts — general-purpose models must publish training compute
items.summary: The final enforcement timeline begins September 2026. Large-model providers will have to disclose training compute, datasets, and safety evaluations publicly.

items.title: The Boring Company opens first downtown Las Vegas Loop extension
items.summary: The tunnel system now connects the Strip to downtown, cutting the 4-mile surface commute to under 6 minutes. More city contracts are in negotiation.

items.title: X rolling out community-owned recommendation algorithms in beta
items.summary: Creators can publish open-source ranking scripts for their followers. Early testers report 2x engagement for niche topics compared to default timeline.

items.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini Multimodal v2 publishes MMMLU leaderboard sweep
items.summary: Gemini v2 overtakes competitors on 12 of 17 multimodal benchmarks. Internal paper highlights a distilled 8B variant running on consumer GPUs.

items.title: Starlink reaches 8 million active terminals, commercial aviation deal with Emirates
items.summary: Emirates will roll out Starlink in-flight internet across 260 widebodies by year-end. SpaceX reports a $4B annualized revenue run-rate for the division.

items.title: Anthropic publishes long-context evaluation suite — 2M tokens, <3% needle-in-haystack drift
items.summary: The public benchmark now includes 16 languages and 4 coding frameworks. Competitors will have to open their test harnesses to be included in the next refresh.
